name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
LOULOU PUFFER Quilted Lambskin Bag, made of 100% lambskin, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; adorned with YSL metal logo, matte finish, and unique silver brushed metal hardware; satin lining, magnetic closure, one zippered interior pocket. Strap length: 52cm, folded length: 28cm
Dimensions: 29x17x11cm
Model: 577476
